itemSimulatorWorkspace.title: Path of Exile 2 — Item simulator
itemSimulatorWorkspace.intro: Pick a base and optional target modifiers. Each time you press optimization search, the server runs Q-learning from scratch (same exalted cost model as the RL page) and reports a suggested first action and action mix.

baseItem.title: Base item
baseItem.description: Select the item you are crafting on.

desiredMods.title: Modifiers
desiredMods.description: Add the modifiers you want on your item and adjust roll settings.

result.title: Optimization search
result.description: Each click retrains Q-learning on the server. Your modifier count (1–6) sets the RL desired good mods; with none selected, a default of 3 is used.

optimizationExplore.emptyPrompt: Press the button to train Q-learning and view results. Modifier list length (1–6) maps to desired good mods for this run; with no modifiers, training uses 3 as a default.
optimizationExplore.paramsSummary: Run: desired good mods {desiredGoodMods}, chaos budget {budget}, episodes {episodes}.
optimizationExplore.desiredModsHint: Your modifier list has {count} entries (used as desired good mods for this run).
optimizationExplore.defaultDesiredModsHint: No modifiers selected — training used 3 desired good mods (default).
optimizationExplore.payloadEchoModsHeading: Target modifiers sent with this request
